resources.string: Muavin works in the background to warn you about radars.\nYou focus on the road, it handles the rest.
Display over other apps permission is required. Grant permission to Muavin in settings.
Location permission is required for Muavin to see radars.

string-array.name: muavin_quotes
string-array.item: Take it easy champion, your destination isn\'t running away.
Eyes on the road, not the gas. I\'m here.
I see the radar before it sees you.
Watch the needle if you love your wallet!
Fast gets there early, slow gets there safely.
The roads are yours, the caution is my job.
Maybe rein in those horses under the hood a bit.
Radars lie in wait, Muavin spoils the game.
Is your seatbelt on? Check it!
Don\'t speed, think of those waiting for you.
Don\'t let the road end with a ticket.
Be careful all the time, not just when you see a radar.
The passion for speed is nice, but fines are sad.

resources.string: I track radars along the way and protect you from fines.
I need permissions to see the radars around you. Muavin does not share your data with third parties.
Some permissions were denied. Muavin needs all permissions to work correctly.
Attention! You are exceeding the speed limit. The limit is %d kilometers.
